title: Call with John Monforte
content:
Call with John Monforte


John Monforte suggests creating a live stream of two AI platforms interacting, which can be monetized through a token. The token will be launched on pump.fun, and the live stream will be promoted on Twitter. The goal is to create something entertaining and engaging that people will want to watch and invest in.

  • AI Platform Live Stream: John Monforte proposes creating a live stream of two AI platforms interacting, aiming for entertainment and investment opportunities.
  • Monetization Strategy: The live stream will be monetized through a token launched on pump.fun, with promotion on Twitter.
  • Project Vision: The goal is to create an engaging and entertaining experience that encourages viewership and investment.
  • Content Creation for Tokenization: John Monforte suggests creating content that can be tokenized, emphasizing the potential for monetization through a token representing the content.
  • Token as the Sole Purchase: John Monforte proposes that the only purchasable item should be the token itself, which represents the content and allows for creator fees on each transaction.
context: From document: Call with John Monforte — chunk 1 (chunk 1/13)
